notes: Params added incrementally as screens are mapped. Fill <FILL_ME> values before running tests that require backend authentication.

credentials.valid_email: <FILL_ME: email address of a registered Farmacity account>
credentials.valid_password: <FILL_ME: password for the registered account above>
credentials.user_first_name: <FILL_ME: first name of the account associated with valid_email — shown in home-screen greeting>

registration.valid_code: <FILL_ME: 6-digit access code received by email — must be retrieved fresh before each test run>
registration.gender: <FILL_ME: one of the available gender options in the selector — inspect dropdown to confirm values>
